description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly elongated arms raised above the head, giving a surreal and stylized appearance. The figure wears a sleeveless top and knee-length shorts, with visible rips or marks on the shirt, and sports a pair of sneakers. The head is adorned with a visor or sunglasses, and the face is stylized with a prominent mouth and nose. The arms are extremely long, extending far above the head and converging at a point, possibly suggesting a dynamic or whimsical pose. The figure's posture is upright, with both feet flat on the ground and arms forming a dramatic V-shape overhead. The overall design is cartoonish and abstract, with simplified anatomical features and bold proportions.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated arms raised overhead, wearing a sleeveless top, shorts, sneakers, and a visor. The figure has a cartoonish, abstract appearance with exaggerated proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full body, face, sleeveless top, shorts, sneakers, and the dramatic V-shaped raised arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length and upward angle of the arms, the profile of the head with visor, and the layered look of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the sleeveless top, shorts, and the convergence of the arms above the figure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elongated arms, the side profile of the face and visor, and the layered sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top and knee-length shorts with a visor accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised overhead
